description: Wisdom rules seeded at genre-proposal time from a successful reflection. Expected to be curated + extended via future LEARN.5 wisdom-rule proposals as sessions in this genre accumulate.

rules.rule: Tower defense games MUST have a clear path for enemies to follow, which players can influence through tower placement.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre

rules.rule: Players should have the ability to upgrade towers to increase their effectiveness against stronger waves.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre

rules.rule: Resource management is crucial; players must balance spending on new towers versus upgrading existing ones.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre

rules.rule: The game should progressively increase in difficulty, introducing new enemy types and challenges.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre

rules.rule: Players should be able to see the impact of their strategic decisions in real-time as waves progress.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre
